data.name: Acorn Energy, Inc.
data.description: Acorn Energy, Inc., through its subsidiary, develops and markets wireless remote monitoring and control systems in the United States and internationally. It operates through two segments: Power Generation (PG) and Cathodic Protection (CP). data.name: Accendra Health, Inc.
data.description: Accendra Health, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates as a healthcare solutions company in the United States. data.name: Adamas Trust, Inc.
data.description: Adamas Trust, Inc. acquires, invests in, finances, and manages mortgage-related single-family and multifamily residential assets in the United States. The company operates through two segments: Investment Portfolio and Constructive.
